title: TwoRefPoints Property
description: Sets / returns whether a calibration should use two reference points instead of one.
notes:
Set TwoRefPoints to True to use two reference points for a calibration.  During calibration, when CameraOrientation is set to Fixed upward, the system will search for the target, rotate 180 degrees, and search for the target again to calculate the midpoint of the two searches.

See Also: TwoRefPoints Property
